description: Crafted from soft cotton/lycra fabric, this medium coverage lightly padded brassiere from enamor is designed with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. This brassiere is designed with a no-show feature that allows you to wear it under thin fabric. Made of breathable stretch cotton/lycra fabric with foam padding for enhanced comfort Seamless, lightly padded and moulded styling for perfect shaping and invisibility Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade
